'''wadodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachmaster|coachmaster]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachmaster|coachmaster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wadodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædedeth|wædedeth]] || [[word:wædedej|wædedej]] || [[word:wædedesh|wædedesh]] || [[word:wædede|wædede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadododoth|wadododoth]] || [[word:wadododoj|wadododoj]] || [[word:wadododosh|wadododosh]] || [[word:wadododo|wadododo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadodoth|wadodoth]] || [[word:wadodoj|wadodoj]] || [[word:wadodosh|wadodosh]] || [[word:wadodo|wadodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadofdoth|wadofdoth]] || [[word:wadofdoj|wadofdoj]] || [[word:wadofdosh|wadofdosh]] || [[word:wadofdof|wadofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadodotho|wadodotho]] || [[word:wadodojo|wadodojo]] || [[word:wadodosho|wadodosho]] || [[word:wadodoko|wadodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadodoth|wadodoth]] || [[word:wadodoj|wadodoj]] || [[word:wadodosh|wadodosh]] || [[word:wadodo|wadodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadodothol|wadodothol]] || [[word:wadodojol|wadodojol]] || [[word:wadodoshol|wadodoshol]] || [[word:wadodokol|wadodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadodothotho|wadodothotho]] || [[word:wadodojojo|wadodojojo]] || [[word:wadodoshosho|wadodoshosho]] || [[word:wadodoko|wadodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadodothon|wadodothon]] || [[word:wadodojon|wadodojon]] || [[word:wadodoshon|wadodoshon]] || [[word:wadodokon|wadodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadodothoro|wadodothoro]] || [[word:wadodojoro|wadodojoro]] || [[word:wadodoshoro|wadodoshoro]] || [[word:wadodokoro|wadodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
